title: Generated-Positive Scheduler Seq6257 P005 Gain
module_detail: Diffusion-ReID/CTF-inspired weak-positive scheduling feeds a no-anchor local reviewer; M8 applies only one island move; M12 validates the real delivery path.
used_in_pipeline: yes: root ./demo.sh now defaults to this DS1 method reproduction
summary: A generated-positive scheduler/reviewer pass finds one additional residual island, seq6257, and moves it from component 30 / gid 96000032 to component 16 / gid 96000017. Canonical p005_area IDF1 improves from 0.668974 to 0.669019.
implementation: This is not score replay and not an anchor-trained classifier. The script rebuilds the previous best from no-anchor tracklet evidence, reruns weakmetric/SigLIP local-gated candidate generation, materializes SigLIP rank10 as a single-tracklet repair, exports a fresh submission zip, then scores direct, density_simple and p005_area. The generated-positive idea is used as a scheduler/admission principle: local positives must agree with DINO/SigLIP/weakmetric evidence before M8 can move a tracklet. No plaintext API key is used or stored; no image API output is required for this promoted gain.
environment: python with numpy pandas pyarrow scikit-learn reid-hota and Pillow
OPENAI_API_KEY is optional for future image experiments and is never passed as plaintext in commands

workflow_steps.action: reproduce feature-outlier, fresh-subpart and local-gated combo stages from committed feature evidence
workflow_steps.output: previous best combo assignment sha ce6e9b2d...

workflow_steps.action: test scheduler candidates ranked by local positive evidence and hard-negative risk
move only seq6257 from component 30 to component 16
export fresh submission, run density_simple, then run p005_area with config_name check and dropped-row check

visual_cases.title: Generated-positive scheduler seq6257
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM05/Tc6 island moves from component 30 / gid 96000032 to component 16 / gid 96000017 after local weak-positive scheduling and SigLIP-led reviewer evidence.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous graph kept seq6257 in component 30 even though local visual evidence across SigLIP, weakmetric and DINO manifests pointed to component 16.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq6257, then require direct, density_simple and p005_area end-to-end validation before promotion.

visual_cases.title: SigLIP local-gated island seq1199
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM03/Tc6 island moves from component 89 / gid 960000481 to component 87 / gid 960000351. This is the strongest single p005 repair.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous graph left seq1199 as a residual island in component 89 even though local SigLIP evidence preferred component 87.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq1199, then require direct+density+p005 validation before using it.

visual_cases.title: Weakmetric local-gated island seq4690
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM04/Tc6 island moves from component 86 / gid 960000350 to component 37 / gid 96000040.
visual_cases.failure_reason: A broad 86->37 merge is risky, but this individual island has local support and direct/p005 validation.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq4690; avoid broad component merge.

visual_cases.title: Weakmetric local-gated island seq5716
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM04/Tc6 island moves from component 9 / gid 96000010 to component 26 / gid 96000028.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The previous graph kept seq5716 in a large source component despite local evidence for component 26.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq5716 and keep it only because it improves the top3 combo.

ablations.name: seq6257_density_simple
ablations.change: run density_simple delivery after direct export

ablations.name: seq6257_p005_area
ablations.result: IDF1 0.669019, HOTA 0.529605, AssA 0.539828, dropped 45467, config p005_area

next: Use seq6257 as a hard positive training/admission example for the scheduler, but keep all seven tie/negative candidates as hard negatives. Future image-generation positives should only be admitted through environment-variable API access plus DINO/SigLIP/weakmetric CTF; never plaintext key commands.
